questions.question: Flink Web UI: какой DAG colour означает 'operator не имеет idle time, CPU/state bottleneck здесь'?

options.text: Красный (busyTimeMsPerSecond > 90%). Bottleneck здесь — needs parallelism increase, hot path optimization, или migration к async. Не путать с чёрным (backpressured > 50% — bottleneck downstream) или синим (idle — bottleneck upstream)

questions.explanation: Color decoding для diagnostic flow: зелёный busy<50% healthy; жёлтый 50-90% working с малой reserve; красный >90% CPU/state bottleneck; синий idle>50% bottleneck upstream (move к source); чёрный/розовый backpressured>50% bottleneck downstream (move к sink). Знайте до автоматизма — 80% production issues identified в первые 60 секунд через DAG colors.

questions.question: Какие 4 типа метрик в Flink и их типичные use cases?

options.text: Counter (accumulated monotonic: errors, processedRecords), Gauge (instantaneous: cacheSize, memoryUsed), Meter (events/sec — редко используется, Counter + rate() предпочтительнее), Histogram (distribution с percentiles: latencyMs, sizes). Critical: SlidingTimeWindowReservoir для sharp window histograms, не default ExponentiallyDecayingReservoir

questions.explanation: Counter — accumulated, increment-only. Gauge — lambda evaluated на каждый scrape (cache calculation, don't put expensive logic). Meter — wrapper для rate, но Prometheus computes rate из counter (Meter redundant). Histogram — percentile distributions, choice of reservoir critical. SlidingTimeWindowReservoir(60s) — sharp 60-second window, нужно для time-bound alerting. ExponentiallyDecayingReservoir biased recent samples но не sharp.

questions.question: Какие 12 топ-метрик нужны для production Flink Grafana dashboard?

options.text: Checkpoint duration P95, state size, numberOfFailedCheckpoints, watermark lag, busyTime% per operator, backPressuredTime%, throughput, numLateRecordsDropped, GC time/min, Heap %, Direct memory, RocksDB compaction pending bytes

questions.explanation: Top 12 cover main production failure modes. Alert thresholds: ckpt duration > timeout/2 warning; FailedCheckpoints > 0 в 10min critical; Watermark lag > 5min high; backPressuredTime > 800ms/sec sustained 5min high; numLateRecordsDropped > 0 high; GC > 10s/min G1 medium; Heap > 90% sustained warning; Direct memory linear growth = leak; RocksDB compaction-pending растёт = write stall coming. Hierarchy: Fleet → Per-job → Operator → Backend-specific.

questions.question: PrometheusReporter vs PushGateway — production decision?

options.text: PrometheusReporter (pull) — стандарт для long-running streaming. K8s service discovery через annotations (prometheus.io/scrape=true, prometheus.io/port=9249). PushGateway — ТОЛЬКО для short-lived batch jobs (Boundedness.BOUNDED), exit прежде чем Prometheus scrape. Streaming с PushGateway — антипаттерн

questions.explanation: Pull standard для streaming — Prometheus scrapes endpoint каждые 15s, K8s auto-discovery elastic. Push only batch. PushGateway accumulates metrics forever если не cleanup (TTL script). Cardinality считается главной проблемой Prometheus + Flink в large clusters — scope.variables.excludes: subtask_index reduces 10-50×. На 250k+ series consider VictoriaMetrics (high cardinality optimized, 5-10× less disk).

questions.question: OpenTelemetry в Flink 2.3 — что покрывает и какой trace structure для checkpoint?

options.text: Coverage 1.20+ checkpoint lifecycle, job submission, task lifecycle, async I/O (2.3 GA gRPC export). Checkpoint trace: root Checkpoint-N → barrier-injection → barrier-propagation (per-operator alignment slow visible) → async-snapshot (per-subtask) → dfs-upload → notify-complete. Tags: checkpoint_id, state_size, alignment_duration. Slow checkpoint debugging — 15min trace exploration vs hours blind tuning

questions.explanation: OTel в Flink — emerging, GA gRPC export 2.3. Главный use case — slow checkpoint debugging. Trace структура показывает где время теряется: alignment (backpressure), async (state size), upload (DFS throughput). gRPC vs HTTP: ~30% less overhead binary protobuf, persistent connections. Production rule: sampling 1-5% для regular, always_on для checkpoint spans (rare events). Context propagation через Kafka headers — end-to-end traces через сервисы. Backend: Tempo (Grafana stack) или Jaeger (standalone).

questions.question: FLIP-570 Runtime Data Sampling (Flink 2.3+) — что даёт и какие use cases?

options.text: Live sampling реальных records в Web UI без redeploy. 1-2 секунды от click. Use cases: data skew investigation (sample busy subtask, identify hot key), data quality issues (find null/malformed fields), schema evolution verification, deduplication check, watermark/event-time debug. Near-zero overhead (<1% throughput drop). Production rule: enable + access control + PII blocklist для sensitive operators

questions.explanation: Game changer для production debugging. До FLIP-570: per-record logging (flood), redeploy с debug code (slow), угадывание. FLIP-570: click 'Sample 100 records' на operator → live data. Sample size up to 1000, optional filter (userId='u_001', amount > 100). Lightweight wrapper на mailbox, fixed buffer, auto-detach. PII/compliance critical — production sampling раскрывает реальные данные. Required: access control, PII operator blocklist.

questions.question: Per-record logging в hot path (processElement, map) — best practice для production debugging.
questions.explanation: False. Per-record logging — главный антипаттерн production logging. 100k records/sec × 1KB = 100MB/sec disk write → disk full, log pipeline overload, $$$$ storage cost. Used by inexperienced devs — code reviews must catch. Alternatives: (1) Sampled logging (counter % 100000 == 0 = 1 of 100k); (2) Error-only (errors rare); (3) Event-driven (state transitions, alerts). Volume rule: < 100 lines/sec per TM в steady state. Modern Flink 2.3+: используйте FLIP-570 Runtime Sampling для ad-hoc inspection — properly designed для это.

questions.question: Structured JSON logging в Flink 2.3+ — что и зачем?

options.text: Каждое поле — search-able key в Elasticsearch/Loki. Plain text: 'найти checkpoint duration > 60s' невозможно без custom parsers. JSON: query 'checkpoint_id:123 AND duration_ms:>60000' точно. Configuration: JsonTemplateLayout. Plus MDC context (user_id, event_id) автоматически attached внутри scope. Plus async appender обязателен — sync writing блокирует mailbox thread на high write rate

questions.explanation: Production стандарт modern observability. JsonTemplateLayout (log4j2): eventTemplateUri=classpath:LogstashJsonEventLayoutV1.json. Async appender: appender.async.type = Async, queueSize=4096 — offloads IO к dedicated thread. Critical для high-throughput. MDC pattern: MDC.put('user_id', id) внутри try → automatic attachment. Modern slf4j 2.x: LOG.atWarn().addKeyValue('field', value).log() — explicit. Production: structured JSON + async + MDC = baseline modern Flink logging.

questions.question: Tiered alert severity для Flink production — какие 4 tier и examples?

options.text: Critical (P0, page): job stopped, persistent ckpt failures, OOMKilled. High (P1, Slack mention): sustained backpressure >5min, watermark stuck >10min, duration spikes, late records. Medium (P2, daily digest): state growth, GC elevated, RocksDB compaction backlog. Info (P3, Slack channel no notify): throughput drop trend, heap > 80%. 'for' duration важен — 'for: 10m' для sustained issues eliminates transient noise

questions.explanation: Alert fatigue — главная угроза. 200+ alerts/week → on-call ignores all → real incidents lost. Tiered prevents этого. Critical = wake-up justified (rare, < 5/month). High = same-day attention. Medium = trend issues weekly review. Info = observability. Alertmanager routing: critical → PagerDuty, high → Slack mention, medium → daily digest. 'for: 10m' — eliminates transient backpressure spikes (90% noise). De-duplication: group_by job_name not subtask. Inhibition rules: silence correlated alerts. Quarterly review.

questions.question: Production observability strategy для Flink — что должно быть в setup?

options.text: Web UI (live ad-hoc diagnosis, DAG, flame graphs, FLIP-570 sampling) + Prometheus/VictoriaMetrics (historical metrics, alerting) + Grafana (dashboards, alerts) + OpenTelemetry Tempo/Jaeger (distributed tracing, slow checkpoint debugging) + Loki/Elasticsearch (log aggregation с structured JSON). Plus flink-history-server (post-mortem completed jobs). Не выбирайте one over other — production needs all

questions.explanation: Modern observability triangle: metrics (what), traces (why), logs (что именно случилось). + Web UI для live diagnosis, FLIP-570 sampling для ad-hoc record inspection, history server для post-mortem. Не silver bullet — each tool different strengths. Metrics historical trends + alerting. Traces для slow individual events / checkpoints. Logs для rare events: errors, lifecycle, config changes. Together = comprehensive production debugging capability. Without всех — blind spots в production.
